articles.author: Arjun Kharpal
articles.title: Chaos, confusion and $200 billion dreams: What I saw at India’s AI summit - CNBC
articles.description: India hosted one of the world's biggest AI events this week, but it was marred by impossible traffic and a lack of organization.
articles.content:
CNBC's Arjun Kharpal sits down with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman at the AI Impact Summit. Photo: Yolande Chee
India hosted one of the world's biggest AI events this week, but it was marred by chaos and con… [+4617 chars]
